description: Namaste рҹҷҸрҹҸј I am Sonal Sharma. I practice and teach Ashtanga yoga along with my brother Sandeep. We started our yoga journey in 2015 with Iyengar Yoga in Pune. After three years we decided to learn Ashtanga Yoga from our Guruji in Mysore and till date we are practicing the sequence of asanas and pranayama on regular basis to understand its effects on the body and mind. When we talk about yoga the aim should be to control our thoughts as a thought reflects our breath and our breath reflects our body. So, we start by the gross which is our body. Preparing the body via asana practice. And then preparing the mind via breath control. It takes commitment of daily practice to achieve this and certain changes in the lifestyle. description: Yoga practices and teaching for people who want to go a little deeper. I'm Gem Maryan, E-RYT 500 and yoga therapist in training (C-IAYT). On this channel you'll find Yin yoga, Ashtanga, Vinyasa, restorative practice, yoga nidra, meditation and chair yoga for older adults and people with limited mobility. My teaching is rooted in anatomy, nervous system awareness and somatic research. Not yoga as performance. Yoga as a precision tool for working with real bodies, in real life. This channel sits alongside my work at Deeside Yoga Institute, where I offer advanced teacher training in Yin, Restorative and Somatic practice, and one-to-one yoga therapy sessions. ____________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________ Find me here: Website and training: deesideyogainstitute.com Monthly writing: inayame81.substack.com Free resources: deesideyogainstitute.com/freeresources Enquiries: deesideyogainstitute@gmail.com
